name: US Foods Holding Corp.
description: US Foods Holding Corp. is a leading American foodservice distributor that partners with approximately 250,000 restaurants and foodservice operators to help their businesses succeed. Headquartered in Rosemont, Illinois, the company manufactures, markets, and distributes a comprehensive range of fresh, frozen, and dry food products, as well as non-food items. Its extensive portfolio includes meat, seafood, dairy, beverages, and produce, serving a diverse customer base that includes independent and multi-unit restaurants, healthcare and hospitality entities, and government and educational institutions across the United States.
